## Summary

- What user problem does this change solve?
- What public behavior changes, if any?

## Design notes

- Why is this the right abstraction for the library?
- What alternatives were rejected?

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests updated or added
- [ ] README or docs updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] Demo or manual verification performed when relevant

## Risks

- Any compatibility, rendering, or PDF layout risks to call out?
